title: VarianceApplication
description: A filing of a new BSA case — a zoning variance, special permit, extension of time, or appeal of a DOB determination. NET-NEW: there is NO online application portal and NO Open Data twin for filing. Today applicants download PDF forms (bz_form.pdf, appeal_form.pdf, bzy_form.pdf, soc_form.pdf, etc.), assemble checklists and drawings, and file on paper; only the resulting case STATUS later appears in Open Data. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a filer's own submitted applications) and the write surface (file a variance/appeal).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned filing / intake identifier. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

calendar.description: BSA calendar number assigned once the case is docketed. Assigned by BSA, not the filer.

status.description: Filing / case lifecycle status. Set by BSA, not the filer.

section.description: Zoning Resolution / General City Law section relied upon, e.g. '72-21' (variance), '73-XX' (special permit), 'GCL 36' (appeal).

reliefSought.description: Narrative of the relief requested — the project and the waivers/permits sought.

applicant.description: The applicant / owner filing the case.

attachments.description: Required exhibits (application form, checklist, zoning analysis, drawings, radius map, CEQR/EAS, photographs).

preApplicationMeetingDate.description: Date of any prior pre-application meeting with Board staff.
